text:
The department or a public or private entity contracted to operate a toll project may contract with an agency of this state or a local governmental entity for the services of peace officers employed by the agency or entity to enforce laws related to:

(1) the regulation and control of vehicular traffic on a state highway; and

(2) the payment of the proper toll on a toll project.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.907 — Contract for Enforcement

The department or a public or private entity contracted to operate a toll project may contract with an agency of this state or a local governmental entity for the services of peace officers employed by the agency or entity to enforce laws related to:

    (1) the regulation and control of vehicular traffic on a state highway; and

    (2) the payment of the proper toll on a toll project.

*Added by Acts 2005, 79th Leg., Ch. 281 (H.B.2702), Sec. 2.09, eff. June 14, 2005.*

subsections.text: The department or a public or private entity contracted to operate a toll project may contract with an agency of this state or a local governmental entity for the services of peace officers employed by the agency or entity to enforce laws related to:
the regulation and control of vehicular traffic on a state highway; and
the payment of the proper toll on a toll project.
